name: Lets get this show on the road!
description:
Welcome! I AM back and better than ever and ready to make some new adventures!



Yes I know what kinger did made me look dead, but I can't die! I'm a god!
So its time to get this new show on the road after all, you can't create without destruction hahah!
And you all wont leave me like... never mind.
creator: Caine_Digital_hallucinations
